description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build and test, using the default Docker image omos/argon2-gpu:zesty-nocuda and a global before_script that runs `git submodule update --init` and creates a symlink for libOpenCL if missing. In the build stage define four jobs—build-clang-cuda, build-clang-nocuda, build-gcc-cuda, and build-gcc-nocuda—where the *-cuda jobs override the image to omos/argon2-gpu:zesty-cuda, each exporting COMPILER and CUDA variables (clang or gcc, cuda) and then sourcing `scripts/ci-build.sh`, and each publishing its respective build directory (e.g., build/clang-cuda/) as an artifact. Also in the build stage add an update-pocl job that caches the `pocl/` directory with key `pocl-build`, stores it as an artifact, and runs `. scripts/ci-update-pocl.sh`. In the test stage define test-clang-nocuda and test-gcc-nocuda jobs that depend on their matching build jobs and on update-pocl, export the same COMPILER and CUDA (nocuda) variables, and execute `. scripts/ci-test.sh`. No explicit rules or only/except conditions are set, so all jobs run on every pipeline.
